ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "asset_type_number" TEXT /* Type number of the asset (vehicle) */,
  "asset_number" TEXT /* Unique number of the asset (vehicle) */,
  "reporting_period_beginning_date" TEXT /* Beginning date of the reporting period */,
  "reporting_period_ending_date" TEXT /* Ending date of the reporting period */,
  "originator_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan originator */,
  "origination_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was originated */,
  "original_loan_amount" REAL /* Original amount of the loan */,
  "original_loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in months */,
  "loan_maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date of the loan */,
  "original_interest_rate_percentage" REAL /* Original interest rate as a percentage */,
  "interest_calculation_type_code" INTEGER /* Type code for calculating interest */,
  "original_interest_rate_type_code" INTEGER /* Type code for the original interest rate */,
  "original_first_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the original first payment */,
  "underwriting_indicator" INTEGER /* Indicator if the loan is underwritten */,
  "grace_period_number" INTEGER /* Grace period for payments in months */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer handling the loan */,
  "loan_status_code" INTEGER /* Current status code of the loan */,
  "subvented_loan_indicator" INTEGER /* Indicator if the loan is subvented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_officer_id") REFERENCES loans_officers ("loan_officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the vehicle */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Manufacturer name of the vehicle */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Model name of the vehicle */,
  "new_used_code" INTEGER /* Code indicating if the vehicle is new or used */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type_code" INTEGER /* Type code for the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_value_amount" REAL /* Value of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_vin" TEXT /* VIN of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_condition_code" INTEGER /* Condition code of the vehicle at the time of origination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obligors" (
  "obligor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each obligor */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the obligor */,
  "credit_score_type" TEXT /* Type of credit score used */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the obligor */,
  "income_verification_level_code" INTEGER /* Code indicating income verification level */,
  "employment_verification_code" INTEGER /* Code indicating employment verification status */,
  "payment_to_income_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the obligor's income allocated to payments */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the obligor */,
  "obligor_name" TEXT /* Name of the obligor */,
  "obligor_address" TEXT /* Address of the obligor */,
  "obligor_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the obligor */,
  "obligor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the obligor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obligor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obligors_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obligor_income" (
  "obligor_income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each obligor income record */,
  "obligor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the obligor associated with the income record */,
  "gross_income_amount" REAL /* Gross income amount of the obligor */,
  "net_income_amount" REAL /* Net income amount of the obligor */,
  "income_verification_date" TEXT /* Date the income was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obligor_income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obligor_income_obligor_id FOREIGN KEY ("obligor_id") REFERENCES obligors ("obligor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obligor_employment" (
  "obligor_employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each obligor employment record */,
  "obligor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the obligor associated with the employment record */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the obligor's employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the obligor */,
  "employment_date" TEXT /* Date the obligor started working */,
  "employment_verification_date" TEXT /* Date the employment was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obligor_employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obligor_employment_obligor_id FOREIGN KEY ("obligor_id") REFERENCES obligors ("obligor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans_officers" (
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "loan_officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan officer */,
  "loan_officer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan officer */,
  "loan_officer_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "underwriters" (
  "underwriter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each underwriter */,
  "underwriter_name" TEXT /* Name of the underwriter */,
  "underwriter_email" TEXT /* Email address of the underwriter */,
  "underwriter_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the underwriter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("underwriter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servicing_agents" (
  "servicing_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each servicing agent */,
  "servicing_agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the servicing agent */,
  "servicing_agent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the servicing agent */,
  "servicing_agent_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the servicing agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("servicing_agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the payment */,
  "scheduled_payment_amount" REAL /* Scheduled payment amount for the loan */,
  "actual_payment_amount" REAL /* Actual amount paid by the borrower */,
  "interest_collected_amount" REAL /* Amount of interest collected */,
  "principal_collected_amount" REAL /* Amount of principal collected */,
  "other_collected_amount" REAL /* Amount of other fees collected */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method_code" INTEGER /* Code indicating the payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servicing" (
  "servicing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each servicing activity */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the servicing activity */,
  "servicing_advance_method_code" INTEGER /* Method of servicing advance used */,
  "servicing_fee_percentage" REAL /* Percentage fee charged for servicing */,
  "servicing_flat_fee_amount" REAL /* Flat fee amount charged for servicing */,
  "servicing_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the servicing agent handling the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("servicing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servicing_servicing_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("servicing_agent_id") REFERENCES servicing_agents ("servicing_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servicing_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delinquency" (
  "delinquency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delinquency record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the delinquency record */,
  "current_delinquency_status" INTEGER /* Current status of delinquency */,
  "zero_balance_effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of zero balance status */,
  "delinquency_date" TEXT /* Date the loan became delinquent */,
  "delinquency_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the delinquency was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delinquency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delinquency_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repo_events" (
  "repo_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repossession event */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the repossession */,
  "repossessed_indicator" INTEGER /* Indicator if the asset was repossessed */,
  "repossessed_proceeds_amount" REAL /* Amount of proceeds from repossession */,
  "repo_date" TEXT /* Date the repossession occurred */,
  "repo_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repossession agent handling the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repo_events_repo_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_agent_id") REFERENCES repo_agents ("repo_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repo_events_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repo_agents" (
  "repo_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repossession agent */,
  "repo_agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the repossession agent */,
  "repo_agent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the repossession agent */,
  "repo_agent_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the repossession agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the modification */,
  "modification_type_code" INTEGER /* Type code for the modification made */,
  "repurchase_amount" REAL /* Amount for any repurchase associated with the modification */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date the modification was made */,
  "underwriter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the underwriter who made the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifications_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifications_underwriter_id FOREIGN KEY ("underwriter_id") REFERENCES underwriters ("underwriter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the document */,
  "document_type_code" INTEGER /* Type code for the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "document_file_path" TEXT /* File path where the document is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)
